center.name: 哈利斯科州
center.summary: 哈利斯科州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联20种鸟类，包括Elegant quail、Clark's grebe、Lesser roadrunner等20种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Their breeding range in the western contiguous United States largely consists of the wooded foothills of the Rocky Mountains and many other large mountain ranges from Washington to southern California extending east to central Colorado and westernmost Texas. Somewhat discontinuous breeding populations are found in southeastern Arizona and southwestern New Mexico, thence also somewhat spottily into western Mexico down through Sonora and Chihuahua along the Sierra Madre Occidental as far as Jalisco and Guerrero, their worldwide southern limit as a breeding species.Monson, G

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Vagrants have been recorded in Jalisco, Morelos, and Tabasco. Separate populations are in west-central Guatemala, El Salvador, and approximately the western half of Honduras. It has relatively recently been found in extreme northwestern Nicaragua, and "[i]t is unclear whether this represents a range extension or whether the species had simply been overlooked previously". The black thrush inhabits montane evergreen and pine-oak forest in the subtropical and temperate zones. It also occurs in semi-deciduous forest and cloudforest. Overall it ranges in elevation between but is most common between . South of Mexico it ranges between

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: relicta is found in six southwestern Mexico states, Jalisco, Colima, Morelos, Puebla, Guerrero and Oaxaca

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Checklist dataset |publisher=GBIF Secretariat |doi=10.15468/39omei |access-date=25 November 2018}} The range of this bird in Mexico is distributed in two streaks southward; one from the California border along the Pacific coast throughout Baja California and across the gulf along the coast to southern Sonora, the other a higher altitude, inland distribution running down from the Big Bend region behind the Texas border down the mountains of central Mexico, with the highest concentration in population in the south from Jalisco to Puebla and northern Oaxaca, where the distribution abruptly ceases

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Elegant quail are found only in Mexico, on the Pacific slopes of the Sierra Madre Occidental at altitudes of up to . Their range extends from Sonora and southwestern Chihuahua to northern Jalisco and they are generally found in thorny scrub and deciduous forest, on open ground and cultivated fields

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: septentrionalis is found further south in western Mexico's southern Zacatecas and northern Jalisco. In Arizona the five-striped sparrow inhabits rocky hillsides and canyon walls with dense low scrubby vegetation. In Mexico it inhabits the same landscapes and also steep hillsides in tropical deciduous forest and some flatter areas

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The nominate is found in the Trans-Mexican Volcanic Belt from Jalisco and Michoacán east to western Puebla

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: pallidus is found in central Sinaloa, western Durango and southwards to Jalisco and Michoacán; P

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: J.|title=The birds of El Salvador|year=1938|volume=23|publisher=Field Museum of Natural History|url=https://www.biodiversitylibrary.org/page/2779758#page/234/mode/1up}} They also adapt to cultivated land such as henequen and corn fields. Its breeding range is in southwestern Mexico, north into the western side of the Sierra Madre Occidental range, along with northern Central America and a disjunct range in the northern Yucatán Peninsula. It overlaps with the range of the greater roadrunner in a small area in the states of Sonora, Sinaloa, Jalisco, and Michoacán.{{cite book|last1=Howell|first1=Steve N

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: rayi: western Mexico from southern Jalisco to Oaxaca The Mexican chickadee inhabits pine, pine-oak, and spruce/fir forest in the subtropical and tropical zones at elevations between . In the U

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The nominate subspecies of the rufous-backed thrush is found in western Mexico from Sonora south to about Jalisco. It also is an occasional visitor to southeastern California, southern Arizona, south-central New Mexico, and far western Texas. Subspecies T

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The West Mexican chachalaca is found in a swath of southwestern Mexico between northern Jalisco and southwestern Chiapas and inland as far as southwestern Puebla

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: umbrosus is found in northwestern Mexico from Sonora and Chihuahua south to Durango, Nayarit, and Jalisco

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: margarethae is found in northwestern and western Mexico from Sinaloa and Chihuahua to Jalisco. There is one record from the Huachuca Mountains of southeastern Arizona, U.S.A. The species inhabits several montane landscapes including the interiors, edges, and clearings of semi-humid to humid pine-oak and evergreen forest, cloudforest, and humid scrublands

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: In the northern end of its range it appears to be spreading from coastal Southeast Alaska across the Coast Mountains into southern Yukon Territory. Steller's jay is also found in Mexico's interior highlands from Chihuahua and Sonora in the northwest southward to Jalisco, as well as other patchy populations found throughout Mexico

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in Jalisco and northeastern Colima

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It ranges in Pacific-slope thorn forest from Jalisco, Mexico, to Northern Puntarenas, Costa Rica

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: pinicola is the northernmost; it is found in Mexico from Sonora south to Jalisco

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: This species occurs in pairs or small groups in woodland, except for humid woodland, and partially open areas on the Pacific Slope of Mexico from southern Sonora south to Jalisco and northwestern Colima, for a total of

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: nelsoni is found in southwestern Mexico, from Nayarit, Jalisco and Colima southward to western Guerrero; and C
